name: 護妹狂魔兄妹情
description: 三位哥哥對妹妹無條件寵溺，既是女主的底牌也是喜劇調劑。衝突來自兄妹之間「你太高調了」vs「我要保護你」的拉鋸。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: Didn't we say be Loki? Be low key. / Big Brother, does my dress look pretty? / Our little sister. Nobody gets to bully her either.
examples.context: 三位哥哥對妹妹無條件寵溺，既是女主的底牌也是喜劇調劑。衝突來自兄妹之間「你太高調了」vs「我要保護你」的拉鋸。
